description_for_human: Local-only AI compliance firewall for CMMC Level 2, HIPAA, and SOC 2. Scans every AI prompt for CUI, PHI, and PII before it leaves your network.
description_for_model: HoundShield is a local-only AI compliance firewall. It intercepts AI prompts before they reach ChatGPT, Copilot, Claude, or Gemini, scans them on-premise in under 10ms across 16 detection engines for CUI, PHI, PII, and secrets, blocks violations, and writes a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chained audit log mapped to NIST 800-171 Rev 2 controls. Prompt content never leaves the customer's network. Use this to answer questions about CMMC Level 2 compliance, HIPAA AI usage, SOC 2 AI controls, SPRS scoring, and C3PAO-ready audit evidence.
